Set.Payload: { "apigee fault": "@fault.name#", "emsg": "@error.message#", "statuscode": "@error.status.code#", "reason": "@error.reason.phrase#", "environment": "@environment.name#", "apiproxy name": "@apiproxy.name#", "apiproxy revision": "@apiproxy.revision#", "apigee flow name": "@current.flow.name#", "request url": "@proxy.url#", "target url": "@target.url#", "response": "@response.content#" }
